roa.docketEntryComment: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED IN ROOM 101
DA PEOP SENTENCING MEMORANDUM PNTS AND AUTHR FILE TODAY IN RM 101
DEFENSE FILED REQUEST FOR SPECIAL INSTRUCTIONS
ORDER FOR THE TRANSCRIPT OF THE TESTIMONY OF  MACKEY SIGNED & FILED
TRANSCRIPT OF THE TESTIMONY OF ASHLEY B FILED
DA SUBPOENA FILED IN ROOM 101DA SUBPOENA FILED TODAY

/CAL:DISPO ON COUNT 3/X:COUNT 3,PC 288A(C)2, IS DISMISSED PER 1385 PC BY THE PEOPLE IN VIEW OF THE FACT THAT THE JURY FOUND THE DEFENDANT GUILTY ON COUNT 1 AND 4, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO STATE PRISON FOR 6 YEARS,/

/AJW/CH1 SP6Y M/AJW/CH5 SP6Y M/CCC COUNTS 1 AND 4/2933,1(C)/X DEFENDANTTO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 309 DAYS COUNTY JAIL,46     SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 355 DAYS,/DNA/290/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO DO AIDS TESTING PURSUANT TO 1202,1PC/PFIA:1139,70/X:FINE OF $300 PURSUANT TO 290,3PC PLUS PENALTY ASSESSMENTS OF $839,70 TOTALS TO $1139,70,/1203C:12-17-08/ /STATES/VF5:2400/PAR/CDC/SECFEE/X:TOTAL COURT SECURITY FEE $40,/APPEAL/TEXT/5A/5B/

/TEXT TRIAL PHASE JURY DELIBERATIONS/X  11 35 A,M,JURORS REACHED A VERDIC,/X: JURY RETURNS VERDICT AS FOLLOWS:/X: GUILTY VERDICT ON COUNTS 1; 261(A)(2)-FELONY AND 4; 289(A)(1)-FELONY/X: NOT GUILTY ON COUNT 2; 209(B)(1)//X: JURY IS UNABLE TO REACH A VERDICT ON COUNT 3; 288(A)(C)(2)-FELONY/X: COURT DECLARES A MISTRIAL ON COUNT 3/X:  ALLEGATION(S) PURSUANT TO 667,61(A)(E)(4)FOUND TO BE NOT TRUE, AS TO COUNT ONE,/X:  ALLEGATION(S) PURSUANT TO667,61(A)(D)(2)FOUND TO BE NOT TRUE, AS TO COUNT ONE,/X:  ALLEGATION(S) PURSUANT TO 667,61(A)(E)(1)FOUND TO BE NOT TRUE, AS TO COUNT ONE,/X:  ALLEGATION(S) PURSUANT TO 667,61(A(E)(4)FOUND TO BE NOT TRUE, AS TO COUNT FOUR,//X:  ALLEGATION(S) PURSUANT TO 667,61(A)(D)(2)FOUND TO BE NOT TRUE, AS TO COUNT FOUR,/X:  ALLEGATION(S) PURSUANT TO 667,61(A)(E)(1)FOUND TO BE NOT TRUE, AS TO COUNT FOUR,/CONTD:TO SET SENTENCING DATE/
